summary: Comprehensive end-to-end test of NOWREALM backend (35 pytest cases) and frontend smoke. Backend: 35/35 passed + 1 documented xfail. Frontend: landing, pricing, signup, admin login, admin tabs all working. Two minor backend code-quality bugs found, one frontend testid missing.

minor.issue: Spec says foundational ($11) tier should get 403 from community posts. Backend's _is_member_or_admin() in server.py:714 treats both 'full' and 'foundational' as members, so foundational members CAN post. Need to restrict to user.role=='admin' or user.tier=='full' for community write actions. (Read access is fine.)

Response returns summary.sent=False even after scheduler._send_summary completes. server.py:987-991 updates DB to sent=True but never mutates the local `doc` dict before returning. Cosmetic: re-fetch the doc or set doc['sent']=True before returning.
No password strength policy - accepts single-char passwords like 'p'. Consider min length / pydantic Field(min_length=8).

ui_bugs.issue: data-testid 'admin-tab-email-log' is missing. The Email Log tab renders visually (label 'EMAIL LOG') but its testid likely uses 'admin-tab-emaillog' or 'admin-tab-outbox'. Add data-testid='admin-tab-email-log' for testability per the review request.
data-testid 'waitlist-email' and 'waitlist-submit' do not render on /pricing when doors are open. They only appear when doors_open=false. Acceptable conditional render, but worth noting for tests.

action_items: Restrict community write endpoints (create_post / add_comment) to full-tier + admin only; reject foundational tier with 403 to honor spec
Fix POST /api/admin/monthly-summary response to reflect sent=true after scheduler._send_summary
Add data-testid='admin-tab-email-log' to the Email Log admin tab in Admin.jsx
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1140 lines - well over the 700-line guideline. Consider splitting into routers: routers/auth.py, routers/admin.py, routers/community.py, routers/drops.py, routers/billing.py.
_is_member_or_admin() conflates 'full' and 'foundational' tiers; spec differentiates community access between tiers. Add a separate _is_full_member() guard for community writes.

checkout/status endpoint always upserts subscription tier on every call as long as payment_status==paid; idempotency check on line 319 prevents repeat finalization which is correct, but consider also guarding against tier downgrade if user later downgrades and replays the URL.

Stripe webhook does not validate signature even in real mode (server.py:453 just notes 'In real mode, you'd validate signature.'). For production, integrate stripe.Webhook.construct_event with STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET.
billing/cancel action='cancel' deletes user data but does not actually cancel via stripe in real mode if sub_id is None on a foundational user; flow is OK in dev-mode.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (all critical smoke tests pass; admin-tab-email-log testid missing)

test_credentials: Admin: robinangel700@gmail.com / BoopLoop777. Test members created dynamically with @example.com domain (pydantic EmailStr rejects .test TLD).
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_ prefixed users, drops, posts, notes, bookmarks. A few drops (TEST_DropFull_Updated, TEST_PastDrop) remain in DB. Doors setting toggled but restored to open at end of TestDoorsCap.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is comprehensive (35 cases) and reusable. Use @example.com domain for test emails (pydantic EmailStr rejects .test). Stripe dev-mode (sk_test_emergent) flow: POST /api/checkout/subscription returns dev_mode=true with deterministic session_id; GET /api/checkout/status/{session_id} finalizes the subscription, sets tier=full, grants mammon_breaker download, and queues onboarding email to emails_outbox. The 300 cap test toggles doors setting via /api/admin/settings and restores it. Frontend dev-mode UI subscription flow auto-triggers via /pricing?auto=full_monthly after signup with ?plan= query param.
rca of the issue: N/A - no blocking bugs found. Three minor backend issues + one minor frontend testid gap, all documented above with file/line references.
